doido-market.title: DOIDO Market
doido-market.description: NFT/Gift marketplace: client built with React, Redux Toolkit, and React Router v7; backend on Node.js, Express, and TypeORM; integrated TON payments, Telegram Auth, and bot flows.

zycsel-store-bot.title: Zycsel Store Bot
zycsel-store-bot.description: Telegram clothing search and catalog bot using Supabase as database, Node.js with GrammY framework, and Telegram API integration.

studio-dashboard.title: Studio Dashboard
studio-dashboard.description: Admin dashboard built with React, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, and Ant Design; backend on Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL.

3mpq-studio-lite.title: 3mpq Studio Lite
3mpq-studio-lite.description: Showcase website built with Next.js, Tailwind, Zustand, next-intl, and React Hook Form. Smooth Framer Motion animations.

webwise.title: Webwise (Logics7)
webwise.description: Marketing landing page built with Next.js, Tailwind, and Spline 3D; integrated with Zoho CRM.

turbota-liqpay.title: Turbota — LiqPay Integration
turbota-liqpay.description: Payment integration for Turbota service built with Node.js and Express using LiqPay API.

anyway.title: Anyway
anyway.description: A clean and modern website built for a video production team — showcasing their work, services, and creative process. Made in Webflow.

custom-globe.title: Custom Three.js Globe for website
custom-globe.description: Interactive Three.js globe component for a website.

out-of-the-box-test.title: Out-of-the-box test task
out-of-the-box-test.description: Landing page for test task with advanced animations
